briefdescription.para: Create a scroll area base with grow/fill geometry.
Scroll one or more rows up.
Scroll one or more rows down.
Scroll one or more columns left.
Scroll one or more columns right.
Scroll by the smallest amount needed to make a content rectangle visible.

simplesect.para: The content size used for scrolling.
The viewport rectangle in this surface's local coordinates.
The visible rectangle in content coordinates.

briefdescription.para: Layout direct children within this surface.

parameterdescription.para: Layout access for measuring and placing child surfaces.

briefdescription.para: Paint this surface into the target buffer.

parameterdescription.para: The paint context for the current paint pass.

briefdescription.para: Create and add the scroll bar surfaces to the child storage.
Check if this manager manages the given surface.

simplesect.para: true to accept a surface being added as a child, false to throw an exception.

briefdescription.para: Calculate the content size for one viewport size.
Measure the content size for one viewport size.

memberdef.argsstring: (Position scrollOffset, Rectangle targetRect, WritableBuffer &buffer, const PaintContext &context) noexcept=0
memberdef.name: onPaintArea

briefdescription.para: React to a scroll offset change.
Resolve scrollbar visibility for one available size.
Apply the current scrollbar state to all scrollbar child surfaces.
Synchronize scroll bar ranges with the current metrics.
Calculate the viewport size after reserving visible scroll bars.
Shared base for scrollable surfaces that paint custom content into a viewport.
